scanPrerequisites.description: pact-plan must consume the persisted scan snapshot from disk and stop when it is missing instead of reconstructing repo facts from chat memory.

requiredMachineState.description: Canonical persisted planning state for Pact provider verification. It must capture provider selection, artifact-source strategy, verification readiness, provider-state work, coverage summary, safe ordered next tasks, verification approach, and explicit blockers without inventing runnable verification unsupported by scan evidence.

verdictTaxonomy.description: pact-plan must classify planning readiness honestly using this narrow verdict set.

stopConditions.description: Required persisted scan state is missing, so planning cannot proceed honestly.
The provider under contract cannot be selected honestly from persisted scan state.
Persisted scan state does not provide enough evidence to choose a runnable pact artifact source.
Persisted scan state shows Pact provider verification is not relevant for this repo within the current MVP boundary.

summaryState.description: Human-readable Pact plan summary only. Canonical machine state stays in plan-state.json.
